title: HTTP Proxy Resolution Flow
activity_flow: [false / httpProxy still null] → getProxyEnv('cgi_http_proxy') → search $_SERVER for 'cgi_http_proxy' / 'CGI_HTTP_PROXY'
key_methods: ProxyManager::getInstance(): ProxyManager — singleton accessor; creates instance on first call
ProxyManager::reset(): void — clears singleton (used in tests)
ProxyManager::__construct() — private; calls getProxyData(), catches RuntimeException into $error
ProxyManager::getProxyData(): void — reads env vars; sets $httpProxy, $httpsProxy, $noProxyHandler
ProxyManager::getProxyEnv(string $envName): array{0:string|null, 1:string} — searches $_SERVER for lowercase AND uppercase variant; returns [value, name] or [null, '']
ProxyManager::getProxyForScheme(string $scheme): ?ProxyItem — returns $httpProxy for 'http', $httpsProxy for 'https', null otherwise
ProxyManager::getProxyForRequest(string $requestUrl): RequestProxy — main public entry; throws TransportException on error, delegates to getProxyForScheme + noProxy
ProxyManager::hasProxy(): bool — true if either httpProxy or httpsProxy is set
key_conditions: PHP_SAPI check: http_proxy only read in CLI/phpdbg mode (security: prevents HTTP_PROXY header injection in CGI)
cgi_http_proxy fallback: used when $httpProxy is still null after CLI check
scheme matching: only 'http' and 'https' are proxied; other schemes return null → RequestProxy::none()
no_proxy check: performed AFTER scheme-based proxy lookup; bypasses proxy if URL matches pattern
error guard: any RuntimeException during construction is stored; getProxyForRequest throws TransportException later
return_outcomes: RequestProxy::none() — no proxy configured for this scheme
RequestProxy::noProxy() — proxy exists but URL matched no_proxy list
$proxy->toRequestProxy(scheme) — active proxy to use for the request
TransportException thrown — proxy config was invalid at construction time
dependencies: ProxyManager uses ProxyItem (composition, holds http/https proxy config)
ProxyManager uses NoProxyPattern (composition, evaluates no_proxy rules)
ProxyManager produces RequestProxy (via ProxyItem::toRequestProxy or static factory methods)
important_notes: Singleton pattern with static reset(). Security-conscious: HTTP_PROXY only honoured in CLI SAPI. Env var lookup is case-sensitive but checks both lower and upper variants. No external I/O after construction — all state captured once in constructor.
